tailored.summary: I am a Staff Engineer with extensive experience in designing and implementing robust, high availability payment processing systems. I bring a proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture using Kafka, and Python development. My expertise aligns with building scalable solutions and providing technical leadership in the FinTech space.

bullets: Designed event-driven architecture using Kafka for real-time order processing, ensuring high availability for critical payment processing systems.
Built high-availability payment APIs handling $10M/day in transactions, leveraging distributed systems principles.
Led architecture review for distributed microservices migration, focusing on scalability and resilience.
Mentored 4 engineers; drove technical standards across the team, contributing to overall technical leadership.
Built Python backend services for financial data processing, supporting critical payment processing systems.
Implemented retry logic and circuit breakers for high-availability requirements in distributed systems.
